stmt: SELECT id, email, name FROM {schema}.{table} WHERE id = $1
SELECT * FROM {schema}.{table} WHERE created_at > $1 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT $2
SELECT t1.id, t1.name FROM {schema}.{table} t1 INNER JOIN {schema}.orders t2 ON t1.id = t2.user_id WHERE t2.status = $1
SELECT id, amount, status FROM {schema}.{table} WHERE user_id = $1 AND status IN ($2, $3)
SELECT * FROM {schema}.{table} WHERE updated_at >= $1 AND updated_at < $2
SELECT DISTINCT category_id FROM {schema}.{table} WHERE active = $1
SELECT id, name, email FROM {schema}.{table} WHERE email LIKE $1
SELECT sum(amount) as total, date_trunc('day', created_at) as day FROM {schema}.{table} GROUP BY day ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT $1
